name: WeatherAPI.com
description: Comprehensive weather API with real-time conditions, forecasts up to 14 days, historical data, marine weather, astronomy, air quality, and sports data. Access weather for 4 million+ locations worldwide.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: WeatherAPI.com provides accurate weather data for 4 million+ locations worldwide. Access current conditions, hourly and daily forecasts up to 14 days, historical weather, marine forecasts, astronomy data (sunrise/sunset/moonrise/moonset), air quality index, time zone information, and sports data. Free tier includes 1 million calls/month. Supports JSON and XML formats. **Note:** Requires free API key from [WeatherAPI.com](https://www.weatherapi.com/signup.aspx). Premium plans available for historical data and higher limits.

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get real-time weather data for any location including temperature, conditions, wind, pressure, humidity, and more

q.description: Location query: city name, coordinates (lat,lon), US ZIP, UK postcode, Canada postal code, IP address, or IATA code (e.g., 'London', '48.8567,2.3508', 'auto:ip')

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast up to 14 days with hourly data, astronomy, and air quality information

q.description: Location query: city name, coordinates, ZIP, postcode, IP, or IATA code

days.description: Number of days for forecast (1-14). Free tier allows up to 3 days.

hour.description: Restrict hourly data to specific hour (0-23)

tools.name: get_future_weather
tools.description: Get future weather forecast between 14 days and 300 days ahead - requires paid plan

dt.description: Date in format 'yyyy-MM-dd' (must be between 14 and 300 days from today)

tools.name: get_historical_weather
tools.description: Get historical weather data for a specific date - requires paid plan

dt.description: Date in format 'yyyy-MM-dd' (on or after 1st Jan, 2010)

hour.description: Restrict hourly data to specific hour (0-23)

tools.name: get_marine_weather
tools.description: Get marine and sailing weather forecast including tide data, swell, and water temperature

q.description: Location query (coordinates work best for marine data: 'lat,lon')

days.description: Number of days for marine forecast (1-7)

tools.name: get_astronomy
tools.description: Get astronomy data including sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, moon phase, and illumination

dt.description: Date in format 'yyyy-MM-dd' (optional, defaults to today)

tools.name: get_timezone
tools.description: Get timezone information for a location including current local time

tools.name: get_sports
tools.description: Get sports data including football, cricket, and golf event schedules and information

tools.name: search_location
tools.description: Search for locations to get city names, coordinates, and region information

q.description: Search query (city or location name, minimum 3 characters)

tools.name: get_ip_lookup
tools.description: Get location information from IP address including city, region, country, coordinates, and timezone

q.description: IP address (IPv4 or IPv6), or 'auto:ip' to detect automatically

tools.name: get_air_quality
tools.description: Get detailed air quality data including AQI, pollutants (CO, NO2, O3, SO2, PM2.5, PM10), and EPA index

aqi.description: Must be 'yes' to get air quality data

tools.name: get_weather_alerts
tools.description: Get government weather alerts and warnings for a location (available for US, Europe, and Canada)

alerts.description: Must be 'yes' to get weather alerts
